Title: Sindhu Darshan Scheme
Description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹15,000/- to pilgrims from Gujarat undertaking the Sindhu Darshan Yatra in Leh-Ladakh, fostering national unity. Intended beneficiaries include native Gujaratis who complete the yatra and apply within 60 days.
Tags: Culture, Pilgrim, Heritage, Pilgrimage, Travel, Tourism

Title: Skiing Course
Description: The scheme aims to promote skiing among the youth of the state by providing professional training, enabling participants to become proficient skiers, competitive athletes, or certified skiing instructors.
Tags: Trainer, Youth, Training, Skiing

Title: Special Basic Mountaineering Course
Description: The scheme aims to enhance mountaineering skills among youth, prepare them to become certified guides, and promote adventure tourism in Uttarakhand.
Tags: Guide, Mountaineering Course, Training, Youth

Title: Special Incentives for Wildlife Resorts
Description: The scheme aims to encourage the establishment of wildlife resorts within the boundaries of notified National Parks, Tiger Reserves, and Sanctuaries in the state to promote balanced and sustainable tourism. The scheme provides a capital subsidy of 20% on the fixed capital investment.
Tags: Subsidy, Capital, Investment, Tourism, Infrastructure

Title: Tirth Barat Yojana
Description: The objective of this scheme is to provide government assistance for pilgrimage to the senior citizens & Persons with Disabilities (PwDs), who are residents of Chhattisgarh, to visit one or more of the various designated pilgrimage sites outside the state, once in their lifetime.
Tags: Tirth Yatra, Senior Citizen, PwD, Pilgrim, BPL, Pilgrimage

Title: Tourist Guide Certification Scheme
Description: The scheme aims to train and certify Goan youth as tourist guides through Basic and Advanced modules. It reimburses fees for the Basic course and sponsors the Advanced curriculum, creating employment and entrepreneurial opportunities in Goa’s tourism sector.
Tags: Training, Certification, Tourism, Entrepreneurship, Employment

Title: Sri Lanka's Sita Temple Tour
Description: The objective of this scheme is to provide financial assistance to state pilgrims traveling to the Sita Temple & Ashoka Vatika in Sri Lanka and the Angkor Wat Temple in Cambodia. Under this scheme, the State Government will reimburse 50% of the expenses of the journey, up to a maximum of ₹30,000/-.
Tags: Sri Lanka, Sita Temple, Pilgrim, Ashok Vatika, Angkor Wat Temple

Title: Sri Ram Janmabhoomi Shabari Smriti Yatra Sahay Scheme
Description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to scheduled tribes and tribal communities for pilgrimage to Sri Ram Janmabhoomi in Ayodhya in memory of Maa Shabari. The scheme offers ₹5,000/- financial assistance per pilgrim to enable darshan of Lord Sri Ram for eligible tribal beneficiaries.
Tags: Pilgrimage, Financial Assistance, Tourism, Travel, Scheduled Tribe

Title: Travel Grants To Goan Authors
Description: The objective of the scheme is to enable the Goan writers to come in close contact with the senior writers of a language-region other than their own within India to acquaint them with the writers and the people of that region, and to widen their awareness and sensibility about the country.
Tags: Travel, Grant, Author, Culture, Artist

Title: Trekking Traction Centre Home-stay Grant Scheme
Description: The scheme aims to promote tourism and improve local livelihoods in rural areas near trekking routes. The scheme provides financial assistance to villagers for constructing or renovating home-stays in traditional hill-style architecture, ensuring quality accommodation for tourists.
Tags: Construction Of Building, Traction Centre, Trekking, Home-stay

Title: Ude Desh ka Aam Nagrik (UDAN) Yojana - Uttarakhand
Description: The scheme aims to make air travel affordable and accessible for all citizens, enhance regional connectivity within Uttarakhand and promote tourism.
Tags: UDAN, Helicopter Service, Flight, Air Travel, Civil Aviation

Title: Dharti Aaba Janjatiya Gram Utkarsh Abhiyaan - DNH & DD
Description: The scheme ensures holistic and sustainable development of tribal communities, building on PMJANMAN. It promotes inter-ministerial convergence across 17 ministries with 25 focused interventions. Gap analysis by departments guides need-based funding to bridge development gaps effectively.
Tags: Dharti Aaba Janjatiya Gram Utkarsh Abhiyaan
